title: pdlink
description: send messages across network by name
body: [pd.link] allows you to communicate to/from different Pd instances over local network, as different versions and even forks of Pure Data (such as plugdata). It works like [send]/[receive] (or [else/sender]/[else/receiver]) as it just needs a symbol address. It works via network but it's simpler as it doesn't require network or OSC configuration! It also allows you to communicate to a [pd~] subprocess.
